leak_free_downstream_evidence.note: ABM trajectory is fit to track the champion forecast (no forward truth) — high correlation ⇒ the ABM re-expresses the champion.

forward_window_residual_diagnostic_descr.caveat: computed on the 17-week forward window (descriptive only); NOT used to select any weight — a leak-free weight needs in-sample.

leaky_bestcase_upper_bound.interpretation: even fitting the weight ON the forward truth (leaky, the most optimistic case) gains this little — a legitimate leak-free weight cannot do better.

verdict: REDUNDANT — point fusion not justified; the leaky best-case blend barely beats the champion, so a leak-free in-sample weight cannot. Keep 0.909 as the headline (do-no-harm); ABM value is mechanism / person-like / counterfactual, not point accuracy.
